name: codex-pro
description: Advanced Codex integration marketplace for Claude Code — drop-in upgrade for openai/codex-plugin-cc with ensemble pattern, hard timeouts, circuit breaker, and structured observability.

plugins.name: codex-pro
plugins.description: v0.7.0: EXTERNAL-CONSUMER CONTRACT (#7) — profile-contract.md + defaults.json (machine-readable single source for model/effort/max_time; consumers pin the contract, not values). Codex integration plugin — environment setup, ensemble review, rescue delegation, and structured background jobs. Read-only setup; mutating commands require explicit user invocation.
